expectations.text: Explains beats and segments parameters of Euclidean notation
expectations.evidence: "beats — how many events to place (3 in your example)" and "segments — total number of time slots in the cycle (8 in your example)"

expectations.text: Mentions Euclidean rhythm or distributing-evenly concept
expectations.evidence: "Euclidean rhythms use Bjorklund's algorithm to distribute N beats as evenly as possible across M time slots"

expectations.text: Mentions the optional third offset parameter
expectations.evidence: "offset — optional rotation of the pattern (default: 0)" with examples s("bd(3,8,2)") and s("bd(3,8,0)")

expectations.text: Provides at least one code example with Euclidean notation
expectations.evidence: Multiple examples: s("bd(3,8)"), s("bd(5,8)"), s("hh(7,8)"), s("bd(3,8,2)"), etc.
